default_tile.name: Forest
default_tile.description: You walk into a dense forest with towering trees. Sunlight filters through the canopy.

tile.name: Village Outskirts
tile.description: The worn dirt roads wind through quiet village buildings.

tile.name: Village Center
tile.description: You walk into the bustling village center. A well sits in the middle of the square, with a bell tower looming above.

tile.name: North Street
tile.description: You walk into the north street. Simple houses line both sides, with gentle weathered doors.

tile.name: Mayor's House
tile.description: You walk into an elegant stone building. It's the Mayor's house—well-kept and impressive.

tile.name: West Street
tile.description: You walk into the west street. The smell of smoke and metal fills the air from the blacksmith's forge.

tile.name: East Street
tile.description: You walk into the east street. The sounds of farming tools and animals echo from nearby fields.

tile.name: South Street
tile.description: You walk into the south street. A guard stands alert, watching for any trouble.

tile.name: Infirmary
tile.description: You walk into the infirmary. The air is clean and the beds are neatly arranged.

tile.name: Inn
tile.description: You walk into the inn. It's dusty and old, but warm. A cozy fireplace flickers with life.
